speaker: VANCE
text: This is Session Two. You’ve learned how to stand. You’ve learned how to protect yourself. You’ve thrown your first punches. Today is about connection. Not power. Not speed. Flow. Here is Mac.

speaker: MAC
text: Mac here. Session Two. Today we reinforce what you learned. Same stance. Same guard. Same punches. But now we start to let them flow together. Nothing new yet. Just cleaner movement.

speaker: MAC
text: Set your stance. Train tracks. Not a tightrope. Front foot forward. Back foot turned slightly. Knees soft. Weight balanced. This is your base. We always come back here. Hold it.

speaker: MAC
text: Hands up. Remember — this isn’t tension. It’s readiness. When the guard stays up, you stay aware. Set the hands. Leave them there. After me. Set of four. Hands set. One. Hands set. Two. Hands set. Three. Hands set. Four. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Stay in stance.

speaker: MAC
text: Back to the jab. This punch controls space. It keeps things where you want them. Loose arm. Fast out. Fast back. Wet towel. Snap, then reset. After me. Set of four. Jab. One. Jab. Two. Jab. Three. Jab. Four. Reset. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Hands down briefly.

speaker: MAC
text: Now the cross. This is where the body helps the arm. Push the floor. Turn the hip. Let the punch follow. Heavy door. You push it shut — you don’t slam it. After me. Set of four. Cross. One. Cross. Two. Cross. Three. Cross. Four. Reset. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Shake the arms out.

speaker: MAC
text: Now we connect them again. Jab sets the line. Cross travels through it. This combination matters. You’ll come back to it again and again. Later, I’ll call this one–two. For now, I’ll still say the punches. After me. Set of four. Jab. Cross. One. Jab. Cross. Two. Jab. Cross. Three. Jab. Cross. Four. Reset. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Let the arms hang.

speaker: MAC
text: Now we work rhythm. No rush. No force. Just smooth repetition. Jab. Cross. Reset. After me. Set of four. Jab. Cross. Reset. One. Jab. Cross. Reset. Two. Jab. Cross. Reset. Three. Jab. Cross. Reset. Four. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Stand tall.

speaker: MAC
text: Take a breath. You moved with control. You stayed balanced. That matters. We’re done.

speaker: VANCE
text: Session Two complete. You’re no longer learning pieces. You’re learning how they fit. This is how progress works here. Layer by layer. Session Three is ready when you are.
